testcase.name: test_filter_age_ms
testcase.failure: tests/test_catalog_b2b.py:76: in test_filter_age_ms assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_new_program_defaults_to_not_in_catalog
testcase.failure: tests/test_catalog_b2b.py:195: in test_new_program_defaults_to_not_in_catalog assert cr.status_code in (200, 201), cr.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","name_en"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name_cs":"TEST_default_false_v60","description_cs":"Test program for default catalog flag","duration":45,"min_capacity":10,"max_capacity":25,"price":100.0,"age_group":"ms_3_6","target_groups":["ms_3_6"],"subject_tags":["test"],"institution_id":"eefb9cbf-52bf-4e20-9418-5b2f659f8d23","is_published":false,"status":"active"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","description_en"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name_cs":"TEST_default_false_v60","description_cs":"Test program for default catalog flag","duration":45,"min_capacity":10,"max_capacity":25,"price":100.0,"age_group":"ms_3_6","target_groups":["ms_3_6"],"subject_tags":["test"],"institution_id":"eefb9cbf-52bf-4e20-9418-5b2f659f8d23","is_published":false,"status":"active"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","target_group"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name_cs":"TEST_default_false_v60","description_cs":"Test program for default catalog flag","duration":45,"min_capacity":10,"max_capacity":25,"price":100.0,"age_group":"ms_3_6","target_groups":["ms_3_6"],"subject_tags":["test"],"institution_id":"eefb9cbf-52bf-4e20-9418-5b2f659f8d23","is_published":false,"status":"active"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
